metadata.description: Deployment scope. `data` = Cosmos+Storage+Redis only; `all` = full footprint.
Enable AOF persistence on Redis (Premium only).
Whether to enable Key Vault purge protection (IRREVERSIBLE — prod only).
AGIC ingress mode. `addon` for dev/staging, `byo` for prod.
Existing App Gateway resource ID. Required when agicMode=byo.
Cluster AAD admin group object IDs.
Log Analytics workspace ID for Container Insights. Empty to skip.
Entra app client ID for the backend API registration.
Entra app client ID for the frontend SPA registration.
Entra group ID for admin role.
Retention in days for Log Analytics.
Cosmos capacity mode. Serverless is good for dev; Standard for staging/prod.
Whether to deny public network access (true for prod).
Capacity tier (e.g. 0 for C0, 1 for C1, 1 for P1).
Enable AOF persistence (Premium only). Required for prod per AGENTS.md §4 rule #4.
Whether to enable purge protection (IRREVERSIBLE — only enable for prod).
Environment short name. Drives sizing defaults.
Kubernetes version. Pin to a known-good supported version.
System pool VM SKU. 2-node baseline for AKS-managed pods (CoreDNS, metrics-server, AGIC).
User pool VM SKU. Hosts application workloads.
AGIC ingress mode. `addon` creates a new App Gateway from agicSubnetCidr; `byo` references agicAppGatewayId.
Subnet CIDR for the add-on App Gateway. Required when agicMode=addon. Must not overlap pod/service CIDRs.
Existing App Gateway resource ID. Required when agicMode=byo. Must be in the same region.
Log Analytics workspace ID for Container Insights. Pass empty to skip.
Admin group object IDs that get cluster-admin via AAD integration. Use the same admin group as Entra app role membership for consistency.

ingressApplicationGateway.config: [if(equals(parameters('agicMode'), 'addon'), createObject('subnetCIDR', parameters('agicSubnetCidr'), 'applicationGatewayName', format('{0}-agw', variables('clusterName')), 'watchNamespace', 'skillhub'), createObject('applicationGatewayId', parameters('agicAppGatewayId'), 'watchNamespace', 'skillhub'))]

metadata.description: ACR SKU. Premium recommended for prod (geo-replication, private endpoints).
Object ID of the kubelet UAMI to grant AcrPull. AKS uses this identity to pull images.
Whether to allow public access. Set false in prod after private endpoint is wired (M5).
OIDC issuer URL from the AKS cluster (aks.outputs.oidcIssuerUrl).
K8s namespace where the SAs live. Helm chart MUST match.
Whether to assign Cosmos data-plane RBAC. Prod=true, dev/staging=false (key-based).
